package_legacy_policy: The pd_imu package may only import historical experiment scripts through pd_imu/core/legacy_experiment_api.py. Any other pd_imu -> run/compose/cache edge fails.
policy: New work should import shared core/facade modules instead of importing historical `run_*`, `compose_*`, or `cache_*` scripts. Existing edges in the baseline remain grandfathered as audit archaeology.
